data.biography:
Laura Elizabeth Dern (born February 10, 1967) is an American actress and filmmaker. She is the recipient of numerous accolades, including an Academy Award, a Primetime Emmy Award, and five Golden Globe Awards. Born to actors Bruce Dern and Diane Ladd, Dern embarked on an acting career in the 1980s and rose to some prominence for her performances in Mask (1985) and David Lynch's Blue Velvet (1986) and Wild at Heart (1990). She received an Academy Award nomination for her portrayal of the titular orphan in the drama film Rambling Rose (1991) and achieved international recognition for her role in Steven Spielberg's adventure film Jurassic Park (1993), a role that she reprised in the 2001 sequel Jurassic Park III.

After winning two Golden Globe Awards for her performances as Katherine Harris in the television film Recount (2008) and Amy Jellicoe in the comedy-drama series Enlightened (2011–2013), Dern garnered her second Academy Award nomination for her work in the biopic Wild (2014). In 2017, she began starring as Renata Klein in the drama series Big Little Lies, winning a Primetime Emmy Award and Golden Globe Award, and reunited with David Lynch for Twin Peaks: The Return. She has since played supporting roles in the films Star Wars: The Last Jedi (2017), Marriage Story (2019), and Little Women (2019). Her performance in Marriage Story won her an Academy Award and Golden Globe Award, both for Best Supporting Actress.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Laura Dern, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Laura Dern

data.biography:
Laura Dern amerikai színésznő 1967. február 10-én látta meg a napvilágot Bruce Dern színész és Diane Ladd színésznő lányaként Los Angeles-ben, Kaliforniában.

Színészi vénájára igen korán felfigyeltek; mindössze 6 éves volt, mikor első alkalommal szerepet kapott édesanyja oldalán egy filmben, az Olcsó Whiskey-ben (1973). A következő évben már Martin Scorsese filmjében, az Alice már nem lakik itt című drámában volt látható néhány percig.

Karrierjében az áttörés 13 éves korában következett be, amikor lehetőséghez jutott a Rókák című, 1980-ban bemutattott amerikai filmdrámában. Ennek köszönhetően a jövőben egyre több film kapcsán számoltak vele, mint például a Maszk (1985), a Kék bársony (1986) vagy a Veszett világ (1990), a Rózsa és tövis (1991), a Jurassic Park (1993), az Ez az életem (1996), az Októberi égbolt (1999), a Nevem Sam (2001), az Inland Empire (2006), a The Master (2012) és a Csillagainkban a hiba (2014) megszületésénél.

Eddig négy alkalommal vehette át a Golden Globe-díjat: 1982: Miss Golden Globe, 1993: legjobb színésznő tv-filmben (Zuhanás után), 2009: legjobb női epizódszereplő tv-filmben (Újraszámlálás), 2012: legjobb színésznő vígjáték tv-sorozatban (Megvilágosultam).

A jövőben látható lesz a 2017-ben bemutatásra kerülő új Star Wars moziban és a Wilson című vígjátékban is.

2005-ben feleségül ment Ben Harper zenészhez, akitől két gyermeke született, Ellery Walker és Jaya. 2013-ban azonban útjaik elváltak egymástól.

Laura Elizabeth Dern (* 10. Februar 1967 in Los Angeles, Kalifornien) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin.

Laura Dern wurde als zweite Tochter des Schauspielerpaares Bruce Dern und Diane Ladd geboren, einen Großteil ihrer Kindheit verbrachte sie bei Filmdrehs ihrer Eltern, ehe sie mit kleinen Nebenrollen in Joseph Sargents Actionfilm Der Tiger hetzt die Meute und Martin Scorseses Drama Alice lebt hier nicht mehr (1974) ihnen nacheiferte. Nach ersten Erfahrungen vor der Kamera trat Dern, die bei Lee Strasberg Schauspiel studierte hatte, 1980 mit einer Nebenrolle in Adrian Lynes Jeanies Clique wieder in Erscheinung, in dem sie an der Seite von Jodie Foster zu sehen war. Der Durchbruch gelang der Miss Golden Globe von 1982 erst mit der Hauptrolle in Joyce Chopras Jugendfilm Bedrohliches Geflüster (1985), in dem Laura Dern als freiheitsliebende 15-jährige Vorstädterin ihren Filmpartner Treat Williams verführte. Größere Bekanntheit erlangte sie durch die Zusammenarbeit mit David Lynch, der sie in seinen Kritiker- und Publikumserfolgen Blue Velvet (1986), Wild at Heart – Die Geschichte von Sailor und Lula (1990) und Inland Empire (2006) einsetzte.

Einen ersten Höhepunkt ihrer Filmkarriere markierte Martha Coolidges Drama Die Lust der schönen Rose (1991), in dem sie an der Seite ihrer Mutter spielte. Für ihr Porträt der 19-jährigen Titelheldin, die mit ihrem unkonventionellen Lebensstil eine US-Südstaatenkleinstadt in den 1930er Jahren gegen sich aufbringt, war sie 1992 als beste Hauptdarstellerin für den Oscar nominiert. Ein Jahr später erhielt sie für Robert Markowitz' Fernsehfilm Afterburn, der auf einer wahren Begebenheit basiert, einen Golden Globe. In dem Drama ist sie als Witwe eines US-Kampfpiloten zu sehen, die einem Komplott zwischen Militär und einem Flugzeughersteller auf die Spur kommt. An diese Erfolge konnte sie trotz Rollen in Steven Spielbergs Kinokassenerfolg Jurassic Park und Clint Eastwoods Perfect World (beide 1993) nicht anknüpfen. Sie arbeitete in den folgenden Jahren überwiegend an Dramen unter so bekannten Regisseuren wie Robert Altman, Alexander Payne oder David Lynch, dessen Film Inland Empire (2006) – mit ihr selbst in der vielgelobten Hauptrolle – sie koproduzierte.

2017 gewann Dern für die Nebenrolle der intriganten Renata Klein in der Miniserie Big Little Lies ihren ersten Emmy, nachdem sie zuvor fünfmal für den wichtigsten US-amerikanischen Fernsehpreis nominiert war, und 2018 erneut auch den Golden Globe Award. Ihr bisher größter Erfolg im Kino war die Rolle der Anwältin Nora Fanshaw in der Tragikomödie Marriage Story. Für ihre hierin dargebotene Leistung erhielt sie jeweils den Oscar, Golden Globe und BAFTA als beste Nebendarstellerin.

Aktorka amerykańska, córka aktora Bruce'a Dern i aktorki Diane Ladd. Po raz pierwszy pojawiła się na ekranie wraz z matką w "White Lighting"  i "Alicja już tu nie mieszka". Oficjalnie zadebiutowała w "Foxes" Adriana Lyne'a. Jej talent ujawnił się w pełni w "Teachers", gdzie grała ciężarną nastolatkę i w "Masce", gdzie wcieliła się w niewidomą dziewczynę, zakochaną w zeszpeconym, chorym chłopcu. Ulubiona artystka Davida Lyncha, zagrała w jego "Dzikości serca" i "Blue Velvet". Najbardziej wymowną kreację stworzyła jednak w "Rambling Rose" jako niezwykła, urocza kobieta Rose. Za tę rolę zdobyła nominację do Oscara za rolę pierwszoplanową. Nominowana była także jej matka, u boku której występowała w tym filmie. Była tez gwiazdą "Parku Jurajskiego", na planie którego nawiązała romans z Jeffem Goldblumem.

Laura Elizabeth Dern (Los Ángeles; 10 de febrero de 1967), conocida como Laura Dern, es una actriz estadounidense ganadora del premio Óscar. Ha trabajado en películas como Máscara (1985), Terciopelo azul (1986), Fat Man and Little Boy (1989), Wild at Heart (1990), Rambling Rose (1991), Parque Jurásico (1993), Un mundo perfecto (1993), Cielo de octubre (1999), I am Sam (2001), Ya no somos dos (2004), Inland Empire (2006), The Master (2012), Alma salvaje (2014), Star Wars: Episodio VIII - Los últimos Jedi (2017) o Historia de un matrimonio (2019).

Fue nominada al Óscar a la mejor actriz por su trabajo en la película Rambling Rose y al Óscar a la mejor actriz de reparto por Alma salvaje, y fue ganadora como mejor actriz de reparto por Historia de un matrimonio. Por Ya no somos dos recibió el premio a la mejor actriz de reparto de la Boston Society of Film Critics. Junto a Isabella Rossellini es una de las musas del aclamado director David Lynch, participando en películas tan icónicas como Wild at Heart o Terciopelo azul.

Descripción anterior del artículo de Wikipedia Laura Dern, con licencia CC-BY-SA 3.0 ES, lista completa de colaboradores en Wikipedia.

Laura Elizabeth Dern (Los Angeles, 10 de fevereiro de 1967) é uma atriz, cineasta e produtora de cinema norte-americana vencedora do Oscar e Emmy. Laura trabalhou em filmes como Smooth Talk (1985), Veludo Azul (1986), Fat Man e Little Boy (1988), Wild at Heart (1990), Jurassic Park (1993) e October Sky (1999). Por seus desempenhos em Rambling Rose (1991) e Wild (2014), foi indicada ao Oscar de Melhor Atriz e Melhor Atriz Coadjuvante, respectivamente. Por sua performance em Marriage Story (2020), ganhou seu quinto Globo de Ouro, seu segundo Critics' Choice, BAFTA e Óscar na categoria de Melhor Atriz Coadjuvante.

ممثلة الاميركية، المخرج والمنتج. ولدت في لوس انجليس، كاليفورنيا،في 10 فبراير عام 1967 بداية حياتها الفنية عام 1973 . عملت في (The Fault in Our Stars [2014]

Jurassic Park [1993]

Little Women [2019]

Star Wars: The Last Jedi [2017]

I Am Sam [2001]).

فازت بجائزة غولدن غلوب عام 2011 لأفضل ممثلة في مسلسل تلفزيوني كوميدي أو موسيقي.

فازت بجازة الأوسكار عام 2020 عن فيلم (Marriage Story).
data.name: لورا ديرن

data.biography: Laura Dern (Los Angeles, 10 de febrer de 1967) és una actriu estatunidenca. El seu paper d'advocada al film Marriage Story, dirigit per Noah Baumbach va ser reconegut amb l'Oscar a la millor actriu secundària. És filla dels actors Bruce Dern i Diane Ladd i besneta del que va ser governador de l'Estat de Utah, George H. Dern. El seu debut cinematogràfic va ser un cameo en la pel·lícula Alícia ja no viu aquí de Martin Scorsese. El 1992, l'actriu i la seva mare, Diane Ladd, van arribar a ser les primeres mare i filla a ser nominades per als premis Oscar, actuant en la mateixa pel·lícula, Rambling Rose, encara que no hi feien de mare i filla. Es coneix a Dern també pel seu intens activisme polític en pro de causes humanitàries, com The Children's Health Environmental Coalition, organització que tracta de cridar l'atenció sobre les substàncies tòxiques que poden afectar la salut dels nens.

data.name: ลอร่า เดิร์น

data.biography:
💥Лора Элизабет Дерн. Родилась в 1967-ом году в Лос-Анджелесе, Калифорния, США. Была единственным ребёнком в семье. Отец работал актёром, а мать была актрисой. Училась в студии Ли Страсберга в Лос-Анджелесе. Работает актрисой и продюсером. Была замужем за музыкантом Беном Харпером, у пары 2-ое детей: сын Эллери и дочь Джайя. Свою текущую личную жизнь предпочитает держать в тайне

🏆Главные награды🏆: Оскар (2020) [История о супружестве], Золотой глобус (1993) [После этого], Золотой глобус (2008) [Рут], Золотой глобус (2012) [Бесстыдники], Золотой глобус (2018) [Большая маленькая ложь], Эмми (2017) [Большая маленькая ложь]

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «Парк юрского периода» (1993), «Дикая» (2014), «Большая маленькая ложь» (2017), «История о супружестве» (2019), «Маленькие женщины» (2019)

⭐Интересный факт⭐: Лора с детства снималась в кино, впервые появившись на экране в 6 лет в фильме «Белая молния»
data.name: Лора Дерн

data.biography:
Laura Elizabeth Dern (nata il 10 febbraio 1967) è un'attrice e regista statunitense. Ha ricevuto numerosi riconoscimenti, tra cui un Academy Award, un Primetime Emmy Award e cinque Golden Globe Awards. Nata dagli attori Bruce Dern e Diane Ladd, la Dern ha intrapreso la carriera di attrice negli anni '80 ed è salita alla ribalta per le sue interpretazioni in Mask (1985) e Velluto blu (1986) e Cuore selvaggio (1990) di David Lynch. Ha ricevuto una nomination all'Oscar per la sua interpretazione dell'orfana titolare nel film drammatico Rambling Rose (1991) e ha ottenuto riconoscimenti internazionali per il suo ruolo nel film d'avventura di Steven Spielberg Jurassic Park (1993), un ruolo che ha ripreso nel sequel del 2001 Jurassic Park III.

Dopo aver vinto due Golden Globe per le sue interpretazioni di Katherine Harris nel film per la televisione Recount (2008) e Amy Jellicoe nella serie commedia drammatica Enlightened (2011-2013), Dern ha ottenuto la sua seconda nomination all'Oscar per il suo lavoro nel film biografico Wild (2014). Nel 2017 ha iniziato a recitare nel ruolo di Renata Klein nella serie drammatica Big Little Lies, vincendo un Primetime Emmy Award e un Golden Globe Award, e si è riunita con David Lynch per Twin Peaks: The Return. Da allora ha interpretato ruoli secondari nei film Star Wars: Gli ultimi Jedi (2017), Marriage Story (2019) e Piccole donne (2019). La sua interpretazione in Marriage Story le è valsa un Oscar e un Golden Globe, entrambi come migliore attrice non protagonista.

森中人，原名季骜杰，安徽人，中国男性配音演员、配音导演。2010年加入月声配音社，2017年在北京成立森中人文化。现为职业配音演员和配音导演。

名字来自《奇诺之旅》中奇诺一把枪的名字，现实中那把枪型号是Colt Woodsman。因为《奇诺之旅》开始喜欢动画、喜欢上配音。大学专业是教育心理学相关，但后来选择去北京从事配音工作。被社团同胞说“配变态是绝活”，但是也很擅长帅气的角色。
data.name: 森中人

data.biography:
森中人，原名季驁傑，安徽人，中國男性配音演員、配音導演。2010 年加入月聲配音社，2017 年在北京成立森中人文化。現為職業配音演員和配音導演。

名字來自《奇諾之旅》中奇諾一把槍的名字，現實中那把槍型號是 Colt Woodsman。因為《奇諾之旅》開始喜歡動畫、喜歡上配音。大學專業是教育心理學相關，但後來選擇去北京從事配音工作。被社團同胞説“配變態是絕活”，但是也很擅長帥氣的角色。
data.name: 森中人

data.overview: Bộ phim xoay quanh một cô gái 17 tuổi mắc chứng dị ứng ánh nắng mặt trời, buộc phải sống khép kín và chỉ có thể ra ngoài vào ban đêm, nơi cô tìm thấy niềm vui khi chơi guitar và tình cờ gặp một chàng trai mà mình thầm ngưỡng mộ, mối quan hệ dần nảy nở trong những khoảnh khắc lãng mạn dưới màn đêm nhưng cũng đầy căng thẳng khi cô che giấu căn bệnh
data.title: Ánh Dương Trong Đêm

data.biography: Safira Ratu Sofya (born 15 April 2004) is an Indonesian actress and model. Her name became known thanks to his roles in the series "Topeng Kaca" and "Dari Jendela SMP".
data.name: Safira Ratu Sofya

data.biography: Ewan Mitchell (born March 8, 1997) is an English actor. He is known for his roles in the ITV period drama The Halcyon (2017), the medieval series The Last Kingdom (2017–2022), the BBC war drama World on Fire (2019–), and the HBO fantasy series House of the Dragon (2022–). He has also appeared in the ITV crime thriller Trigger Point (2022) and Claire Denis' film High Life (2018).
data.name: Ewan Mitchell

data.biography: Ewan Mitchell est un acteur britannique né le 8 mars 1997 à Derby, en Angleterre. Il est surtout connu pour ses rôles dans des séries télévisées à succès. Entre 2017 et 2022, il incarne Osferth dans la série médiévale "The Last Kingdom". En 2019, il joue Tom Bennett dans le drame de la BBC "World on Fire". Depuis 2022, il interprète le prince Aemond Targaryen dans la série fantastique "House of the Dragon", préquelle de "Game of Thrones". Au cinéma, il apparaît notamment dans "High Life" (2018) de Claire Denis et "Saltburn" (2023) d'Emerald Fennell.

Юэн Митчелл (родился 8 марта 1997 года) - английский актер. Он известен своими ролями в исторической драме ITV "Безмятежный отдых" (2017), средневековом сериале "Последнее королевство" (2017-2022), военной драме BBC "Мир в огне" (2019–) и фантастическом сериале HBO "Дом дракона" (2022–). Он также снялся в криминальном триллере ITV Trigger Point (2022) и фильме Клэр Дени "Светская жизнь" (2018).
data.name: Юэн Митчелл

data.biography: Safarina Mum atau lebih dikenali sebagai Dian P. Ramlee merupakan seorang pelakon, pemuzik dan pengacara wanita Malaysia. Beliau merupakan anak angkat kepada Allahyarham Tan Sri P. Ramlee. Dian memulakan kerjayanya sebagai pemain bes untuk menubuhkan Soft White Eyes yang diketuai oleh yang diketuai oleh tiga orang Umarul yang merupakan pemain gitar utama Kumpulan Iklim (gitar utama), Amy Search (penyanyi utama dan gitar irama) dan Yantzen (dram) pada tahun 1973. Pada tahun 1978, Awang menjadi pemain gitar utama untuk menyertai kumpulan Soft White Eyes manakala Umarul diserap sebagai pemain gitar kedua dan kumpulan ini menukar namanya menjadi Kumpulan Titanic pada tahun 1979 dan berkubur pada tahun 1981 sekaligus menghidupkan kembali pada tahun 1983.
data.name: Dian P. Ramlee

data.biography: Wendy Crewson (born May 9, 1956) is a Canadian actress known for her versatile performances in film and television. She has had a prolific career spanning several decades, appearing in a wide range of roles across various genres. Crewson has starred in numerous popular movies, including The Good Son (1993), The Santa Clause series (1994 - 2006), Air Force One (1997), Bicentennial Man (1999), What Lies Beneath (2000), Room (2015), and On the Basis of Sex (2018). She has acted in many television movies and series such as 24 (2003), Saving Hope (2012 - 2017), and Tracker (2024 - 2025).
data.name: Wendy Crewson

data.biography:
Wendy Crewson (* 9. Mai 1956 in Hamilton, Kanada) ist eine kanadische Schauspielerin und Produzentin. Sie begann ihre Karriere im Fernsehen und wurde durch ihre Rolle in The Doctor (1991) bekannt.

Crewson spielte in zahlreichen Hollywood-Filmen, darunter The Good Son (1993), Santa Clause (1994), Air Force One (1997) und Bicentennial Man (1999). Später war sie in What Lies Beneath (2000), The 6th Day (2000) und The Covenant (2006) zu sehen.

Neben Blockbustern wirkte sie in Independent-Filmen wie Better Than Chocolate (1999), Suddenly Naked (2001) und Away from Her (2006) mit. Sie spielte auch in Room (2015) und Into the Forest (2015).

Crewson gewann mehrere Preise, darunter sechs Gemini Awards und zwei Canadian Screen Awards. Im Fernsehen hatte sie Rollen in 24, Revenge und Saving Hope (2012–2017).

Sie studierte an der Queen’s University und der Webber Douglas Academy. Crewson engagiert sich für soziale Projekte und bleibt eine prägende Figur im kanadischen Film und Fernsehen.
Wendy Crewson (Hamilton, Canadà, 9 de maig de 1956) és una actriu canadenca.
温迪·克鲁森 （Wendy Crewson） 是一位加拿大女演员，以其在电影和电视中的多才多艺的表演而闻名。她拥有数十年的多产职业生涯，出演过各种类型的各种角色。克鲁森出演了多部热门电影，包括《圣诞老人》系列、《空军一号》和《好儿子》。她的才华和适应能力使她能够塑造不同的角色，使她成为娱乐界备受尊敬的人物，尤其是在加拿大和美国的电影中。
data.name: 温迪·克鲁森

data.biography: 温迪·克魯森 （温迪·克魯森） 是一位加拿大女演員，以其在電影和電視中的多才多藝的表演而聞名。她擁有數十年的多產職業生涯，出演過各種類型的各種角色。克魯森出演了多部熱門電影，包括《今個聖誕大件事》系列、《空軍一號》和《好兒子》。她的才華和適應能力使她能夠塑造不同的角色，使她成為娛樂界備受尊敬的人物，尤其是在加拿大和美國的電影中。
data.name: 温迪·克魯森

data.biography: Wu Gang (born 9 December 1962) is a Chinese actor. He is known for his roles in Red Firecracker, Green Firecracker (1994), and Iron Man (2009) for which he won both Golden Rooster Award for Best Actor and Shanghai Film Critics Award for Best Actor.
data.name: Wu Gang

data.biography:
吴刚，北京人民艺术剧院国家一级演员。代表作有话剧《雷雨》、电视剧《潜伏》、电影《铁人》等。

1986年8月15日，参演的话剧《二次大战中的帅克》在首都剧场首演，从此开始了演艺生涯。1988年6月12日，参演话剧《天下第一楼》。1991年，出演的历史电影《毛泽东和他的儿子》上映。1996年，参演的战争剧《东周列国·春秋篇》播出。

2001年，主演风格独特的都市情感剧《堆积情感》。2004年，出演的侦探悬疑《黑蚂蚁》。2007年，出演的古装剧《秋海棠》；同年主演的剧情片《箱子》上映，获得第14届北京大学生电影节最佳男主角奖。2008年，出演电视剧《潜伏》，获得第1届电视剧导演工作委员会表彰大典优秀男配角奖。2009年，在电影《铁人》中饰演铁人王进喜，获得 第27届中国电影金鸡奖 最佳男主角 。

2011年，出演《汉阳造》。2013年，出演谍战情感大剧《我的绝密生涯》。2014年参演电视剧《十月围城》。2015年出演电影《三体》。2017年凭借反腐剧《人民的名义》荣获第23届上海电视节最佳男配角奖，同年主演动作片《战狼2》。2019年，主演的缉毒题材剧《破冰行动》，获得第15届中美电视节年度最佳男主角奖；同年主演的剧情电影《妈阁是座城》在中国内地上映，获得第15届中美电影节年度最佳男主角奖。
data.name: 吴刚

data.biography:
吳剛，北京人民藝術劇院國家一級演員。代表作有話劇《雷雨》、電視劇《兒兇》、電影《鐵人》等。

1986 年 8 月 15 日，參演的話劇《二次大戰中的帥克》在首都劇場首演，從此開始了演藝生涯。1988 年 6 月 12 日，參演話劇《天下第一樓》。1991 年，出演的歷史電影《毛澤東和他的兒子》上映。1996 年，參演的戰爭劇《東周列國·春秋篇》播出。

2001 年，主演風格獨特的都市情感劇《堆積情感》。2004 年，出演的偵探懸疑《黑螞蟻》。2007 年，出演的古裝劇《秋海棠》；同年主演的劇情片《箱子》上映，獲得第 14 屆北京大學生電影節最佳男主角獎。2008 年，出演電視劇《兒兇》，獲得第 1 屆電視劇導演工作委員會表彰大典優秀男配角獎。2009 年，在電影《鐵人》中飾演鐵人王進喜，獲得 第 27 屆中國電影金雞獎 最佳男主角 。

2011 年，出演《漢陽造》。2013 年，出演諜戰情感大劇《我的絕密生涯》。2014 年參演電視劇《十月圍城》。2015 年出演電影《三體》。2017 年憑藉反腐劇《人民的名義》榮獲第 23 屆上海電視節最佳男配角獎，同年主演動作片《戰狼 2》。2019 年，主演的緝毒題材劇《破冰行動》，獲得第 15 屆中美電視節年度最佳男主角獎；同年主演的劇情電影《媽閣是座城》在中國內地上映，獲得第 15 屆中美電影節年度最佳男主角獎。
data.name: 吳剛

data.biography:
Nunew Chawarin Perdpiriyawong is a Thai singer, actor, model and host under DOMUNDI TV and DMD Music. He graduated with a bachelor's degree from Kasetsart University's Faculty of Humanities, majoring in Chinese Language.

He made his acting debut in 2022 with a main role in the series "Cutie Pie". Nunew is also known for his singing career. In July 2023, he officially debuted as a solo artist with the release of his first single "Anything (หมอนอิง)".

Outside his career in entertainment, Nunew owns a vitamin gummies brand called 'NuMin'.
data.name: Chawarin Perdpiriyawong

data.biography:
Jay Manuel (born August 14, 1972) is a Canadian TV host, Creative Director, make-up artist, and author. He is most recognizable as the Creative Director on the popular reality television show America's Next Top Model for the first eighteen seasons. Manuel also was featured as the host of Canada's Next Top Model.

Manuel is the Founder and CEO of the beauty line, Jay Manuel Beauty. In 2017, the brand opened its first retail location at Roosevelt Field Mall. Later that year, he was one of the judges for Miss Universe 2017. In 2020, he released his first book, The Wig, The Bitch & The Meltdown.
data.name: Jay Manuel

data.biography:
Phillip Jack Brooks, better known by the ring name CM Punk, is an American professional wrestler, sports commentator, actor, and retired mixed martial artist, currently signed to World Wrestling Entertainment (WWE), best known for his influential WWE career, highlighted by his era-defining rivalry with John Cena.

Brooks began his professional wrestling career in 1999 on the independent circuit, most notably with Ring of Honor (ROH), where he won the ROH World Championship once. He signed with WWE in 2005 and went on to become a multi-time world champion, also holding the Intercontinental, ECW World Heavyweight, and World Tag Team Championships, becoming WWE’s 19th Triple Crown Champion and the fastest to achieve the distinction. He was the only back-to-back Money in the Bank winner, headlined multiple WWE pay-per-view events, won Superstar of the Year at the 2011 Slammy Awards, and was named Wrestler of the Year in 2011 and 2012 by readers of Pro Wrestling Illustrated. Disillusioned with WWE, he left the company acrimoniously and retired from professional wrestling in 2014.

After leaving WWE, Brooks pursued a career in mixed martial arts and signed with the Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC). Competing as a welterweight, he made his professional debut at UFC 203 in 2016, losing to Mickey Gall via submission, and later fought Mike Jackson at UFC 225 in 2018 in a bout that was later overturned to a no-contest, after which he was released.

Following his MMA run, Brooks transitioned into sports commentary and media appearances, including work as an analyst on WWE Backstage from 2019 to 2020.

In 2021, Brooks returned to professional wrestling by signing with All Elite Wrestling (AEW), making his highly publicized debut at AEW Rampage: The First Dance. During his run, he won the AEW World Championship twice and served as one of the promotion’s most prominent and polarizing figures before departing the company in 2023. Later that year, he returned to WWE, resuming his in-ring career with the promotion.

Throughout his career, Brooks has wrestled exclusively under the CM Punk moniker, portraying an outspoken, confrontational, sharp-tongued, anti-establishment character rooted in his straight-edge lifestyle. His persona has emphasized different aspects of those traits depending on whether he was positioned as a hero or a villain.

Outside wrestling, Brooks has acted in film and television, including the horror films Girl on the Third Floor (2019) and Rabid (2019), recurring roles on Mayans M.C. (2019) and the Syfy supernatural series Revival (2024), adapted from a cult comic and built around the dead suddenly returning to life, and voiced zebra ZPD officer Zebro Zebrowski in Disney’s animated feature Zootopia 2 (2025), alongside fellow wrestler Roman Reigns as zebra ZPD officer Zebro Zebraxton.
data.name: Phil Brooks

data.biography: Toby Poser is a film and theater actor, writer, director, producer, and voice over artist. She was born in Huntingdon, PA and lives in both New York and California with her creative partner and husband, John Adams, and their daughters, Lulu and Zelda Adams. The four of them make independent films under the marquee of Wonder Wheel Productions.
data.name: Toby Poser

belongs_to_collection.name: Loạt phim Ngọn Đồi Câm Lặng

data.overview: Khi James nhận được một bức thư bí ẩn từ Mary — người yêu đã mất của mình — anh bị kéo trở lại Silent Hill, thị trấn quen thuộc một thời nay đã chìm trong bóng tối. Trong hành trình tìm kiếm cô, James phải đối mặt với những sinh vật quái dị và dần hé lộ một sự thật kinh hoàng, thứ sẽ đẩy anh đến bờ vực của sự tỉnh táo.
data.title: Đồi Câm Lặng: Ác Mộng Trong Sương

data.biography: Cho (チョー, Chō; December 15, 1957) is a Japanese actor, voice actor, narrator, lyricist and composer from Konosu City, Saitama Prefecture. He is affiliated with Haikyo. His former stage name was Yuichi Nagashima (長島 雄一, Nagashima Yūichi). His real name is Shigeru Nagashima (長島 茂 Nagashima Shigeru).
data.name: Cho

data.biography:
长（日语：チョー Chō，1957年12月15日—），本名长岛茂（日语：長島 茂／ながしま しげる Nagashima Shigeru），旧艺名长岛雄一（日语：長島 雄一／ながしま ゆういち Nagashima Yūichi），是日本男性演员、声优。属于俳协。埼玉县出身。血型是B型。身高167cm、体重63kg。

近年来多出演老人或反派角色。名字“チョー”的理由1据说是来自自己在NHK教育频道主持的节目“探险我的城镇”（たんけんぼくのまち）这个节目的“1等町（チョー）!”的“町”，另外可能是理由2来自他的姓“长岛”的“长”的音读“チョー”。
data.name: 长岛茂

data.biography:
Éanna Hardwicke is an Irish actor and filmmaker. He began his career as a child actor in Conor McPherson's The Eclipse (2009). His films since include Lakelands (2022). On television, he is known for his roles in the BBC One series The Sixth Commandment and the Paramount+ series The Doll Factory (both 2023). For the former, he received a British Academy Television Award nomination.

Hardwicke was named a Screen International Rising Star in the publication's inaugural Irish edition.
data.name: Éanna Hardwicke

data.biography:
Terry Kiser (born August 1, 1939) is an American actor, best known for his portrayal of the dead title-character in the comedy Weekend at Bernie's, and its sequel, Weekend at Bernie's II.

Terry was a regular on two soap operas, The Secret Storm on CBS and The Doctors on NBC. Kiser has guest-starred numerous times on episodic television, particularly sitcoms, though he made a notable appearance as a comedian Vic Hitler (aka, Vic the Narcoleptic Comic) on the drama Hill Street Blues. He also portrayed the conniving Doctor Crews in Friday the 13th Part VII: The New Blood and appeared in Mannequin: On the Move as a sorcerer. He played a jerky lawyer in the volleyball film Sideout. Kiser also had a recurring role as Craven on Night Court, H.G. Wells in Lois and Clark: The New Adventures of Superman. He also appeared in three episodes of Walker, Texas Ranger, The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air, Will & Grace and The Golden Girls, as well as in two episodes of Three's Company as two different characters. Kiser was a member of Carol Burnett's repertory company on Carol and Company that aired in 1990 and 1991.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Terry Kiser, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Terry Kiser

data.biography:
Terry Kiser ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler.

Bekannt wurde er durch die Verkörperung des toten Versicherungschefs Bernie Lomax in den Filmen Immer Ärger mit Bernie und der Fortsetzung Wieder Ärger mit Bernie. Desweiteren war er Darsteller in den Seifenopern The Secret Storm und The Doctors. Kiser hatte auch mehrere Gastauftritte in weiteren populären US-amerikanischen Fernsehserien.
特里·基泽（Terry Kiser，1939 年 8 月 1 日出生）是一位美国演员

data.biography:
Heino Ferch ist ein deutscher Film-, Theater- und Fernsehschauspieler. Zu seinen bekanntesten Filmrollen zählen Albert Speer in „Der Untergang“ (2004) und Harry Melchior in „Der Tunnel“ (2001).

1987 gab Ferch sein Spielfilmdebüt mit einem kurzen Auftritt in Schloss Königswald (Regie: Peter Schamoni). 1989 spielte er seine erste Hauptrolle in Wedding (benannt nach einem Berliner Arbeiterviertel).

1994 folgte unter anderem eine Rolle in der Fernseh-Miniserie Deutschlandlied (Regie: Tom Toelle).

1996 spielte er den Napola-Kommandanten Obersturmbannführer Raufeisen in Der Unhold.

1997 war das Jahr seines Durchbruchs als Filmschauspieler mit seinem Auftritt in  Comedian Harmonists (Regie: Josef Vilsmaier).
data.name: Heino Ferch

data.biography: Heino Ferch is a German actor. In addition to numerous roles in theater and on television, he also became known through films such as Comedian Harmonists, Downfall, and Der Baader Meinhof Komplex.

Adam Fergus was born in Drogheda, Ireland and was raised in the nearby village of Laytown. He attended the University College Dublin, graduating in 2002 with a Bachelor of Arts degree. He studied acting at The Gaiety School of Acting in 2003. Cutting his acting teeth in theater, Adam made his first screen appearance in 2004 on the television series "Proof". Adam swayed evenly between films, film shorts and television appearances. He gained stronger recognition with his roles in the romance film "Satellites and Meteorites" (2008) and then as regular cast member of the Canadian comedy series "Being Erica" (2010-2011) (TV).  - IMDb Mini Biography
data.name: Adam Fergus

data.biography: 亚当·弗格斯（Adam Fergus）出生于爱尔兰的德罗赫达（Drogheda），在附近的莱敦（Laytown）村长大。他就读于都柏林大学学院，于2002年毕业，获得文学学士学位。他于2003年在欢乐表演学院学习表演。亚当在剧院里大放异彩，于2004年在电视连续剧《证明》中首次出现在银幕上。亚当在电影、电影短片和电视露面之间摇摆不定。他因在爱情电影《卫星与陨石》（2008 年）中的角色而获得更大的认可，然后作为加拿大喜剧系列“Being Erica”（2010-2011）（电视）的固定演员。- IMDb 迷你传记
data.name: 亚当·弗格斯

data.biography: 亞當·弗格斯（Adam Fergus）出生於愛爾蘭的德羅赫達（Drogheda），在附近的萊敦（Laytown）村長大。他就讀於都柏林大學學院，於 2002 年畢業，獲得文學學士學位。他於 2003 年在歡樂表演學院學習表演。亞當在劇院裏大放異彩，於 2004 年在電視聯續劇《證明》中首次出現在銀幕上。亞當在電影、電影短片和電視露面之間搖擺不定。他因在愛情電影《衞星與隕石》（2008 年）中的角色而獲得更大的認可，然後作為加拿大喜劇系列“Being Erica”（2010 - 2011）（電視）的固定演員。- IMDb 迷你傳記
data.name: 亞當·弗格斯

data.biography:
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

Michael Carbonaro (born April 28, 1982) is an American actor who was born in New York, New York. In 2003, he kicked off his film career starring as Mikey Falcone in A Tale of Two Pizzas (2003), alongside Vincent Pastore and Frank Vincent, and a year later was featured in the Chappelle's Show (2004) on Comedy Central. He has also starred in the successful Off-Broadway hit comedy, Jewtopia, as the lead character Adam. Following that, Carbonaro took on the bold role of Andy Wilson, a somewhat innocent, fresh-faced teen, in the 2006 comedy, Another Gay Movie (2006). For his work, he was recognized with an OUTfest "Best Actor in a Feature Film" award. Carbonaro has also taken to the television screen playing diverse soap opera characters in All My Children (2006), The Guiding Light (2006) and as rapist Jeff Trapido in, Law & Order: Special Victims Unit (2007).

Description above from the Wikipedia article Michael Carbonaro, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Michael Carbonaro
